hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.subtitle: based in Stockholm.
hero.description: I build high-performance, accessible web applications with Angular, Javascript, React, Next.js and TypeScript. Currently looking for my next challenge in Sweden's tech ecosystem.

about.heading: About Me
about.summary: I am a Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience architecting robust solutions for the BFSI and Logistics sectors. My expertise lies in modernizing legacy systems—most recently leading a complex migration from jQuery to Angular 14 for a client.
about.detailedDescription: Based in Stockholm, I specialize in building scalable **Micro-Frontends** and high-performance web applications. I bridge the gap between complex backend logic and intuitive user experiences.

projects.title: Rule Engine & Dynamic Pricing
projects.description: Architected a high-scale rule engine for real-time special offers. Led the migration of legacy jQuery interfaces to a modern Angular 14 architecture, consuming complex internal APIs.

projects.title: Micro-Frontend Insurance Platform
projects.description: Developed a private banking insurance application from scratch using Module Federation. Created a shared UI library as an NPM package to ensure design consistency across micro-frontends.

projects.title: Loan Origination System (MSME)
projects.description: Built an end-to-end loan management system covering lead entry to automated disbursement. Integrated E-sign and E-Nach APIs for seamless digital contract execution.

projects.title: CMMS Maintenance Platform
projects.description: Engineered a system to track and schedule maintenance for heavy construction equipment across multiple global sites, focusing on production stability and system enhancements.

projects.title: Commercial Vehicle Loan System
projects.description: Automated credit scoring and collateral valuation. Integrated external asset valuation services and CIBIL APIs to determine real-time loan eligibility for commercial clients.

projects.title: Automated Cloud Backup Solution
projects.description: Developed a C#-based utility to automate SQL Server database backups directly to Google Drive on a scheduled basis, ensuring data redundancy and recovery.

experience.description:
Client: Citi | Private Banking – Insurance — Angular, React, Java, Oracle, JavaScript
• Architected and developed insurance booking application from scratch using Angular and React frameworks.
• Created reusable UI component library published as NPM package, adopted across 3+ internal projects.
• Implemented micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation, enabling independent team deployments and scalability.
• Achieved 85%+ code coverage through comprehensive Jest unit testing, reducing production bugs by 30%.
• Migrated legacy jQuery codebase to Angular 14, modernizing tech stack for long-term maintainability.
• Leveraged VS Code with GitHub Copilot for accelerated development and improved code quality.

Client: CRH Americas Materials | CMMS Rewrite — Angular, JavaScript
• Platform Stabilization: Stepped into a critical phase of the project to identify and resolve a high volume of production bugs, successfully stabilizing the application for global users.
• Root Cause Analysis: Performed deep-dive technical analysis into legacy codebases to identify architectural bottlenecks and recurring defects.
• Technical Debt Mitigation: Led the effort to refactor inefficient code patterns and modernize dependencies, reducing the overall technical debt of the frontend layer.
• Hypercare Support: Provided dedicated high-priority support during production rollouts, ensuring zero-downtime transitions and immediate resolution of post-deployment issues.
• Performance Tuning: Optimized existing UI components to improve responsiveness and decrease load times, ensuring the platform met business-critical performance standards.

Client: Vensure | Insurance Booking Platform — Angular 11, .NET Core, SQL
• Feature Development: Delivered high-impact features for a complex insurance booking platform, directly contributing to the end-to-end user experience of quote and policy acquisition.
• Production Bug Resolution: Rapidly identified and patched critical UI and logic bugs in the insurance workflow, ensuring high availability and reliable data processing during peak booking times.
• Domain-Driven Development: Quickly adapted to the nuances of the insurance industry, focusing on complex form validation, multi-step progress tracking, and secure data handling.
• UI/UX Refinement: Collaborated with designers to implement responsive, accessible components that improved user engagement and completion rates in the booking funnel.
• Collaborative Delivery: Worked within an Agile team to meet tight release deadlines, ensuring seamless integration of new features with existing backend insurance APIs.
Developed automated loan origination systems and integrated external financial APIs.
Built school management solutions and automated cloud backup utilities.

contact.heading: Let's Connect
contact.description: Currently open to new opportunities in Stockholm. Feel free to reach out via email or connect on LinkedIn.
